details: Compound 3 IUPAC name slightly varies in stereo/locant ordering vs paper's name in Table 2 but identifies same compound; mp 112-114 °C matches Table 2; DOI 10.55730/1300-0527.3324 present in paper.
Compound 17 mp 175-177 °C matches paper; row name uses 'ethoxyacrylate' while paper uses 'ethoxyacrolate' (same compound, minor spelling variant); DOI 10.3390/ph4081158 present.
Compound 2f mp 89-92 °C matches paper exactly; DOI 10.3390/molecules31050862 present in paper text.
PI-4 = 1-Ethoxyethyl-2-bromoethanoate; bp 85 °C (3 mm Hg) matches paper exactly; PMC3685236 verified.
Mebrofenin melting point 205°C matches abstract; DOI 10.4103/ijnm.ijnm_144_24 present (abstract collection).
Compound 6d, mp 219-221 °C matches paper section 3.1.1.4 exactly; PMC11843914 verified.

Compound 39, m.p. 98-100 °C (dec.) matches paper; property=decomposition matches paper's '(dec.)' label.
2-(4-methoxyphenyl)benzothiazole mp 393 K (392-394 K) matches paper; K→°C conversion (393-273.15=119.85) arithmetically correct.
Compound 4, m.p. 145-147 °C matches paper section 3 exactly; DOI 10.3390/molecules29122942 present.
Compound 6 = 2-Methoxy-4-O-methoxymethylbenzaldehyde, Mp 73-74 °C matches paper exactly; PMC6146477 verified.
Compound 6i mp 209-211 °C matches paper; row name '6-fluoro-5-(morpholin-1-yl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole' equivalent to paper's '6-fluoro-5-(4-morpholine-1-yl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole'; DOI present.
Compound 3b, mp 270°C (decomp.) matches paper; property=decomposition matches paper label; PMC9007260 verified.
Compound 7b, mp >300 °C matches paper; PMC6193216 verified (source_url is PMC).

Row names compound as '2-(2-Chloroquinolin-3-yl)-5-(2-hydroxybenzylidene)-...' (V7, mp 201-203 °C) but value 252-253 °C belongs to V8 which is the 3-hydroxybenzylidene isomer per paper section 2.2.3.8. Wrong-isomer/wrong-value binding.
Compound 12 = N-(Isopropylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid, mp 225-227 °C matches paper; DOI 10.3390/ph19020256 present.
Compound 4 = 5,6-dichloro-2-(4-methoxyphenyl)-1H-benzo[d]imidazole, mp 225-227 °C matches paper; PMC11844072 verified.
Table II compound 11 (4-(4''-thiazolidinone-2'-acetylazino)-4'-acetyldiphenyl sulphide), mp 160°C matches paper Table II; PMC6146903 verified. Quote 'col-fragment' but value+code present.
[Zn(L)(im)2(SO4)] M.P: 236°C matches paper characterization data exactly; PMC10113129 verified.
Compound 11c = 4-Chloro-N-(2-oxo-2H-chromen-6-yl)benzenesulfonamide, mp 234-236 °C matches paper; PMC11203676 verified.
Compound 7 = 3-Allyl-6-(allylamino)-2-phenyl-3,4-dihydro-1,3,5-benzotriazocin-4-thione, M.p. 153-154°C matches paper; PMC6146461 verified.
